title: An Updates Column
excerpt: We need a column that separates the Updates section from the Item and is able to be mirrored. to another board, preferably multiple boards. This would really help communication across monday.com and teams that use multip…

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a column that separates the Updates section from the Item and is able to be mirrored. to another board, preferably multiple boards. This would really help communication across monday.com and teams that use multiple connect boards column per team.
